metadata.description: self-iterate: a Claude-Code-native agent-harness self-iteration loop

plugins.name: self-iterate
plugins.description: Self-iterate any agent's harness (prompt/skills/tools) until a user-defined, verifiable goal is met. Users provide only a .self-iterate/<goal>/ eval spec; a generic claude-p adapter covers Claude-native agents, with a drop-in run_case.py escape hatch for others.
